content:
{"cards": [{"name": "Arcane Convergence", "mana_cost": "{2}{U}{U}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["U"], "color_identity": ["U"], "type_line": "Sorcery", "oracle_text": "Choose one —
• Draw three cards, then put two cards from your hand on top of your library in any order.
• Look at the top seven cards of your library. Put two of them into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in any order.", "flavor_text": ""Knowledge flows like water—sometimes a gentle stream, sometimes a rushing torrent."", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "Modal blue sorcery that offers card selection vs. card advantage. First mode gives immediate cards but requires giving some back (card neutral but improves hand quality). Second mode is pure card advantage but requires more selection. Tests modal formatting and blue's card draw/selection identity. Costed at 4 mana to be powerful but fair for rare."}, {"name": "Withering Strike", "mana_cost": "{1}{B}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["B"], "color_identity": ["B"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "Destroy target creature with mana value 3 or less.", "flavor_text": ""Even the mightiest oak falls to the right touch of decay."", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Simple conditional removal at common. Targets creatures with mana value 3 or less, making it effective early game but limited late game. Black gets efficient creature destruction, and the mana value restriction keeps it balanced for common. Clean targeting language following established patterns."}, {"name": "Gravecaller Adept", "mana_cost": "{2}{B}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["B"], "color_identity": ["B"], "type_line": "Creature — Human Wizard", "oracle_text": "When ~ enters, mill two cards.
{2}{B}, {T}: Return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand.", "flavor_text": ""Death is merely a door, and I hold the key."", "power": "2", "toughness": "2", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "ETB trigger mills cards to enable graveyard strategy, then provides repeatable graveyard recursion. The mill on entry tests trigger wording, while the activated ability provides ongoing value. Stats are fair for cost (2/2 for 3 with upside). Black gets both mill and creature recursion in its color pie. Activated ability is expensive enough to not be oppressive."}, {"name": "Malachar, Death's Herald", "mana_cost": "{3}{B}{B}", "cmc": 5, "colors": ["B"], "color_identity": ["B"], "type_line": "Legendary Creature — Demon", "oracle_text": "Flying, menace
Whenever a creature dies, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.
{2}{B}, Sacrifice a creature: Draw a card.", "flavor_text": null, "power": "4", "toughness": "4", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "mythic", "design_notes": "Mythic legendary demon with three abilities. Flying and menace provide evasion. Triggered ability rewards any creature dying (not just opponents') with life drain - very black. Activated ability converts creatures to cards, classic black sacrifice-for-value. 4/4 flying menace for 5 is solid but not overpowered. Tests legendary design with multiple synergistic abilities that create interesting gameplay decisions."}, {"name": "Lightning Bolt", "mana_cost": "{R}", "cmc": 1, "colors": ["R"], "color_identity": ["R"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "~ deals 3 damage to any target.", "flavor_text": ""The difference between a spark and an inferno is simply a matter of timing."", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Classic efficient burn spell. 3 damage for 1 mana to any target (creature, planeswalker, or player) is the gold standard for red direct damage. Uses 'any target' wording which is current templating for flexible damage spells. Simple, clean, and tests proper damage assignment language. Iconic red effect at common rarity."}]}
